title: DataValidatorOutput
description: Output contract for the Week 1 data_validator handle() function.

is_valid.description: True only when both email and phone pass their respective checks.

email_valid.description: Whether the supplied email address is well-formed.

phone_valid.description: Whether the supplied phone number is well-formed and within ITU-T E.164 digit bounds.

errors.description: Human-readable list of validation failures. Empty array when is_valid is true.
